sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58293" key="kodra/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοδράντης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n58293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quadrans</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of an as,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
